text: China Coal Mine Explosion Kills 90 in Deadliest Blast Since 2009 - Bloomberg.com
fullText: The death toll from a gas explosion at a coal mine in China’s Shanxi province has jumped to at least 90 people, making it the country’s deadliest such incident since 2009.

text: U.S. bans green-card holders from returning from Ebola-stricken countries - The Washington Post
fullText: Health officials cite public health and « resource constraints » as they expand travel restrictions.

text: 4 takeaways: Thunder bench picks up Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, elevates OKC to Game 3 win - NBA
fullText: With a record-setting bench performance, the Thunder stake a 2-1 series lead on a 123-108 victory in Game 3 on the road.

text: Police ordered guns to be removed from mosque shooter’s home in 2025 - The Washington Post
fullText: Authorities’ awareness of one of the gunman’s past behavior raises questions about whether the attack could have been thwarted.

text: Trump administration to force foreigners in the U.S. to apply for a green card abroad - NPR
fullText: Foreigners in the U.S. who want a green card will need to leave and apply in their home country, the Trump administration announced Friday, in a surprise change to a longstanding policy.

text: Judge drops criminal case against Kilmar Abrego García, deeming it vindictive - The Washington Post
fullText: The Maryland man was charged with human smuggling after a high-profile legal fight in which courts ruled he had been illegally deported to El Salvador.

text: Live Updates: U.S. preparing for possible strikes against Iran, sources say, as Rubio says tolls on Strait of Hormuz "not acceptable" - CBS News
fullText: The secretary of state tempered optimism for a deal to end the Iran war, calling Iran's bid to "create a tolling system" in the Strait of Hormuz "not acceptable."

text: 'It Takes Two' rapper Rob Base, who helped bring hip-hop mainstream, dies at 59 - NPR
fullText: Rapper Rob Base has died after a battle with cancer. He was 59. His team shared the news of his death on his Instagram page. Base was one half of the Harlem hip-hop duo Rob Base & DJ E-Z Rock.

text: 40,000 people under evacuation orders for a chemical tank leak in Southern California - AP News
fullText: About 40,000 people are under evacuation orders and schools have shut down in Southern California due to a hazardous chemical leak. Officials say a storage tank began leaking methyl methacrylate, a chemical used in making plastic parts. The tank overheated Th…

text: Paul McCartney helps Stephen Colbert say goodbye to 'The Late Show' in ambitious final show - KSL.com
fullText: Stephen Colbert chatted with Paul McCartney and joined him on stage for a performance of "Hello, Goodbye" on the final broadcast of "The Late Show" on Thursday.

text: ‘T. rex of the sea’: D-FW researchers identify new ancient marine species - Dallas News
fullText: Researchers at SMU and the Perot Museum have identified a new species of mosasaur, a 'T. rex of the sea' that lived alongside dinosaurs millions of years ago.

text: California woman dead in murder-suicide may have given thousands to a scammer claiming to be Tom Selleck - NBC News
fullText: An elderly California couple found dead in a suspected murder-suicide had recently been scammed by someone posing as actor Tom Selleck, a longtime friend said

text: Staten Island fire: At least 31 people injured after explosion in shipyard - ABC7 New York
fullText: One person has died, and dozens of people were injured, including firefighters, following an explosion and fire at a shipyard on Staten Island, according to the FDNY officials.
